tools.name: search_schools
tools.description: Search professional schools (law, medical, dental, MBA, pharmacy, veterinary, optometry) by program type, name, or ranking range. Returns admissions stats and AdmitBase links. Public — no authentication required.

tools.name: get_school_stats
tools.description: Get full admissions statistics for a specific school: GPA/test percentiles, acceptance rate, class size, tuition, employment outcomes. Public — no authentication required.

tools.name: calculate_match_score
tools.description: Given a user's GPA and test score, calculate match category (Safety/Target/Reach/Far Reach), admission probability, and percentiles for one school or a ranked list. Public — no authentication required.

tools.name: save_my_stats
tools.description: Save a user's GPA and test score per program under their AdmitBase API key. Requires `Authorization: Bearer amb_...` header (generate one at https://admitbase.com/profile#api-keys).

tools.name: compare_to_applicants
tools.description: Compare a user's saved stats against anonymous community outcome reports (accepted/waitlisted/rejected). Requires `Authorization: Bearer amb_...` header.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "save_my_stats" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
